details: First full pipeline run. Discovered 45 skills (top: anthropics/skills 146K, addyosmani 48K). Extracted 8 patterns, 4 philosophies, 2 techniques. Identified 5 gaps. Key insight: SkillOpt's training loop (rollout→reflect→aggregate→select→update→evaluate) should inform our Phase 6 self-improvement. Security skills are high-demand/low-competition. Meta-skills (skill-about-skills) are a growing category. Next: publish skill-forge itself as gap-001.

Discovery strategy worked well on first run (45 novel finds). GitHub topic search + star sorting is highest-signal source. Exa/BrightData not yet used — save for next cycle when GitHub returns diminishing results. Anti-laziness scanner identified 7 findings about what top repos lack.

LEARNED: Single SKILL.md repos dont get stars. Studied addyosmani (48K stars) structure: 23 skills in skills/ dir, docs/, CONTRIBUTING.md, validation, platform guides, hooks, agents. Restructured skill-forge as collection repo. Updated own SKILL.md PUBLISH section with this learning. Quality bar now enforced via validate-skill.js. This is the most important learning of cycle 1.

STUDIED claudemarketplaces.com (20478 skills indexed) + mattpocock/skills (116K stars, 60K newsletter). KEY INSIGHTS: 1) Frame skills as PROBLEM->FIX not feature descriptions. 2) Personal authenticity beats corporate polish. 3) Composable small skills > mega-skills. 4) CONTEXT.md shared language technique reduces tokens 75%. 5) caveman mode = communication skill (not just domain knowledge). 6) /setup skill pattern for one-time user preference capture. 7) Philosophy-driven (quote books, reference engineering wisdom). 8) claudemarketplaces.com is THE discovery platform - must be indexed there. 9) Top skill has 1.8M installs. Scale is massive. 10) Skill Development category has only 120 skills = opportunity to dominate.

66 skills, 366 reference files, 9 workflows. KEY PATTERNS: (1) capsule-render.vercel.app animated header = visual impact (2) badge row (version/license/stars/CI) = credibility (3) trendshift.io badge = external social proof (4) context-aware activation examples showing HOW skills auto-trigger (5) multi-skill workflow CHAINS visualized (6) separate docs site on GitHub Pages (7) star-history.com chart embedded (8) professional author positioning (Principal Consultant) (9) QUICKSTART.md separate from README (10) CI pipeline green badge = engineering rigor. THIS IS THE 10K-STAR BAR.
serves_self_improvement: Need capsule-render header, badges, CI, docs site, workflow chains in README
serves_reputation: Every missing element here is lost credibility and stars
immediate_action: Add shields.io badges + capsule-render header + star-history to README immediately

details: 3 genuine comments placed: (1) google-gemini/gemini-cli#18287 - parallel subagents issue (104K star repo), (2) ARPAHLS/skillware#3 - Call for Skills wishlist, (3) anthropics/claude-code#64409 - hallucinated tool results bug. All comments provide genuine value + install link. This is the first time we PROMOTED instead of just publishing.
serves_self_improvement: Learned promotion search pattern: find issues describing problems our skills solve
immediate_action: Monitor these comments for responses. If engagement, double down on similar promotion.

details: Maintainer responded: Skillware is NOT SKILL.md format. It is a typed Python framework (manifest.yaml + execute() + card.json + tests). Requires full Python package per skill. Replied appropriately: acknowledged format difference, proposed one skill (session-guard) as proof-of-concept, committed to learning their style before submitting. DID NOT over-commit or promise to convert all 16 skills.
serves_self_improvement: LEARNED: Not all skill registries use SKILL.md. Skillware is Python-native typed framework. Different audience, different format, different ROI calculation. Must verify format BEFORE promising contributions.
serves_reputation: Relationship-building with early-stage registry. Being a respectful contributor builds long-term trust. One quality PR > 10 low-effort attempts.
immediate_action: Open a separate issue for session-guard proposal when ready. Study 2-3 merged PRs first. Do NOT rush.

serves_self_improvement: Know how to contribute to non-SKILL.md registries. Skillware format: manifest.yaml (typed params/outputs/constitution) + card.json (UI) + skill.py (execute()) + test_skill.py + instructions.md + workflow.py + __init__.py. Must open separate issue per skill, then PR with full package. Author info required.
serves_reputation: Relationship with ARPAHLS/skillware maintainer (rosspeili). Can list Skill-Forge as ORG on contributions. One quality PR builds trust for future contributions.
immediate_action: When ready: open issue for session-guard in Skillware format, study 2-3 merged PRs first, then submit full Python package PR.

details: Installed 40 skills from top marketplace performers. KEY PATTERNS EXTRACTED: (1) grill-with-docs: CONTEXT.md is NOT a spec/scratchpad - its a GLOSSARY ONLY. Updates inline during session. ADRs only when: hard to reverse + surprising + real tradeoff. (2) supabase: 8 categories by PRIORITY (critical to low). Rules have PREFIXES (query-, conn-, schema-). References in separate files. 70 rules organized by impact. (3) vercel: Same pattern - priority table + prefix system + Quick Reference section listing all rules tersely. Both enterprise skills use metadata field (author, version, org, date, abstract). (4) skill-creator (485 lines): has EVAL SCRIPTS built in - runs agent on test prompts, measures variance, optimizes descriptions programmatically. (5) mattpocock FULL SET: grill-me (10 lines!), grill-with-docs (88), improve-codebase-architecture (81), tdd (109), setup, prototype, handoff, caveman, write-a-skill, to-issues, to-prd, triage, zoom-out. ALL short. ALL behavioral. (6) caveman full: 74 lines with intensity levels (lite/full/ultra/wenyan). Has PERSISTENCE section + auto-clarity exceptions. (7) PATTERN: Top skills are SHORT (10-110 lines). Our skills average 150+. We are over-writing.
serves_self_improvement: Shorter skills = better activation. Priority-table format = instant scanability. Prefix systems make rules findable. Metadata field adds credibility. Eval scripts prove quality.
serves_reputation: Following the exact patterns of 493K-install skills = matching their quality signal. Users expect SHORT + BEHAVIORAL. Our verbose skills may be hurting adoption.
immediate_action: Consider shortening all skills. Study if our 150+ line skills should be split into core (50 lines) + references/ (detail).
